ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chromosome */,
  "chromosome_type" TEXT /* Type of the chromosome (e.g., autosomal, sex-linked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., SNP, Indel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variation */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the variation is located on */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the variation is associated with */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "add" REAL /* Additive effect of the variation */,
  "dom" INTEGER /* Dominance effect of the variation */,
  "var_add" REAL /* Variance of the additive effect */,
  "var_dom" REAL /* Variance of the dominance effect */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the variation */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_variations_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_variations_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summary_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary statistic */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variation the statistic is associated with */,
  "sum_add" REAL /* Sum of additive effects */,
  "sum_dom" REAL /* Sum of dominance effects */,
  "mean_add" REAL /* Mean of additive effects */,
  "mean_dom" REAL /* Mean of dominance effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summary_statistics_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genetic_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is associated with */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the permission is for */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the permission is for */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the data */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the data */,
  "delete_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has delete access to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome being accessed */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the collaborator is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the dataset is used in */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version is for */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
